message:
Improve recursive CTE semantics and add IPK codegen verification

Recursive CTE improvements (fsqlite-core/connection.rs):
- Fix self-reference detection: instead of assuming any compound arm is
  recursive, actually check whether each SelectCore references the CTE
  name via a new select_core_references_table() utility function. This
  prevents non-self-referential UNION ALL CTEs from being incorrectly
  run through the recursive iteration loop.
- Implement proper UNION deduplication: base rows are deduped on initial
  materialization; each recursive iteration arm now checks both all_rows
  and new_rows for duplicates when the compound operator is UNION (vs
  UNION ALL which passes through all rows as before).
- Add explicit INTERSECT/EXCEPT rejection with clear error message
  instead of silently treating them as UNION ALL.
- Move MAX_RECURSION constant to function-level scope.
- Add helper functions: contains_value_row() for row membership testing,
  dedup_value_rows() for first-seen-order deduplication.
- Add regression tests: UNION deduplication test verifying only unique
  rows survive, and non-self-reference test confirming WITH RECURSIVE
  keyword alone does not trigger iteration.

IPK codegen verification (fsqlite-vdbe/codegen.rs):
- Add schema_with_ipk_alias() helper for tests with INTEGER PRIMARY KEY
  columns.
- Add tests verifying that IPK column projection emits Rowid opcode
  (not Column opcode), both for explicit column selection and SELECT *.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
